name_address.value: BREWED & PACKAGED IN LIVINGSTON MANOR, NY  672 OLD ROUTE 17 LIVINGSTON MANOR, NY 12758

health_warning.value: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

application.image_quality_notes: Flat artwork file, clearly legible across all elements.
application.model_observations: Catskill Brewery branding printed vertically; Certified Independent Craft seal and 'Think NY, Drink NY' beer mark present; UPC barcode at lower right; tagline 'Honest, Hard Working Beer' and 'Never Turn Off The Light'.
